mapper.sql: id, benefit_no, order_id, member_id, product_id, store_id, total_lessons, used_lessons, frozen_lessons, remaining_lessons, effective_at, expire_at, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pt_member_private_benefit WHERE id = #{value} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM pt_member_private_benefit WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM pt_member_private_benefit WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_member_private_benefit (benefit_no, order_id, member_id, product_id, store_id, total_lessons, used_lessons, frozen_lessons, remaining_lessons, effective_at, expire_at, status) VALUES (#{benefitNo}, #{orderId}, #{memberId}, #{productId}, #{storeId}, #{totalLessons}, #{usedLessons}, #{frozenLessons}, #{remainingLessons}, #{effectiveAt}, #{expireAt}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_member_private_benefit SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 AND remaining_lessons = 0 AND frozen_lessons = 0
UPDATE pt_member_private_benefit SET status = 4 WHERE id = #{id} AND status <> 4 AND remaining_lessons = 0 AND frozen_lessons = 0
UPDATE pt_member_private_benefit SET status = 3 WHERE status = 1 AND expire_at IS NOT NULL AND expire_at < NOW() AND frozen_lessons = 0
